incident_note: Synthetic fixture modeled on live incident 2026-06-30 — do not commit real host exports.
symptom: ERR_PROXY_CONNECTION_FAILED; TCP 443 to google.com OK; WinINET HTTPS path failed until proxy disabled

classification.reasoning: ProxyServer references localhost:60505 but no listener is bound.
limitations: Does not prove malware or MITM.
Listener absence is correlation, not registry-writer proof.
Confidence is ordinal ranking, not calibrated probability.

evidence: No TCP listener on configured localhost port 60505
Proxied HTTPS path failed — consistent with dead WinINET proxy
limitations: Synthetic fixture — observation is not proof

evidence: WinINET proxy disabled after typed confirmation — direct path OK
limitations: Post-fix observation — does not prove root cause

proof.hypothesis: Browser failure is likely caused by dead WinINET localhost proxy.

proof_attempts.name: wininet_winhttp_comparison
proof_attempts.meaning: WinHTTP direct while WinINET proxy enabled — stack mismatch.

proof_attempts.name: direct_vs_proxy_https
proof_attempts.meaning: Direct HTTPS OK; proxied path failed before disable.

limitations: git@github.com Permission denied (publickey) is an SSH key issue, not proxy failure.
